speaker: speaker1
text: Have you ever gotten a parking ticket ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I've never gotten one . Have you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Really ? What did you get one for ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I parked in the red zone .

speaker: speaker1
text: I needed to get something really quick .

speaker: speaker2
text: Don't you have your own parking spot ?

speaker: speaker2
text: That was very lazy of you .
